text: {"claims":[{"statement":"There is a PDF titled “University of Lagos Pocket Statistics”.","claimType":"empirical","quote":"\"University of Lagos Pocket Statistics\" (PDF). _University of Lagos_.","entailment":"The quoted reference lists a PDF with that title, indicating its existence.","population":"","intervention":"","comparator":"","outcome":"","timeframe":"","quantifiers":"","modality":"descriptive"},{"statement":"The University of Lagos was established in 1962.","claimType":"empirical","quote":"\"University of Lagos (1962- ) •\"","entailment":"The quoted title includes the year 1962, indicating the founding year of the university.","population":"","intervention":"","comparator":"","outcome":"","timeframe":"","quantifiers":"","modality":"descriptive"},{"statement":"Prof. Folasade Ogunsola became the first female Vice‑Chancellor of UNILAG.","claimType":"empirical","quote":"\"Prof Folasade Ogunsola emerges first female UNILAG VC\"","entailment":"The quoted article headline states that she emerged as the first female VC, confirming the claim.","population":"","intervention":"","comparator":"","outcome":"","timeframe":"","quantifiers":"","modality":"descriptive"},{"statement":"A panel ordered UNILAG to close its accounts with commercial banks.","claimType":"empirical","quote":"\"Panel orders UNILAG to close accounts with commercial banks\"","entailment":"The quoted news headline reports that a panel gave this order, supporting the claim.","population":"","intervention":"","comparator":"","outcome":"","timeframe":"","quantifiers":"","modality":"descriptive"}]}
